title: DCPTG IS NOT A SCAM!
author: EdiBegi
selftext: Okay so I have been using DCPTG for about 2 weeks now and I can confirm you that it is not a scam. It was recommended to my by a trust worthy friend and I knew that he wouldn’t “scam” me so I went for it. Basically you just have to sign up (you can do so by clicking on my link which helps me a lot 😊 https://www.dcptgsz.com/?tid=76K7QW ), then you deposit money (from 50$ onwards) - i do it over OKX aplication (if you need tutorial i can post it) and all you have to do then is to open it once a day and click 3 times on quantization button which gives you randomized percent of your deposited money (for example if you deposited 100$ and you get 2% of that ehich means you earn 2$ a day just by clicking it 3 times). After 3 days the money you earned starts adding to your balance which then increases it and with that you start esrning more because your balance is higher which also makes your percentage bigger. When you are happy with your balance you can always just cash it out and you get your money in 3 days. I personally deposited 50$ and by inviting family members i got some bonuses and in 2 weeks time my account went from 50$ to 120$. If you have any questions please feel free to leave them in comments.
